name: scene-create
title: Scene / Create
description: Create new scene in the project assets. Use 'scene-list-opened' tool to list all opened scenes after creation.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path to the scene file. Should end with ".unity" extension.

parameters.name: newSceneMode
parameters.description: Scene mode. ENUM: "Single" (close other scenes), "Additive" (keep other scenes). Default: "Single"
